name: Easy Payday Loans
description_short: Memphis, TN's Easy Payday Loans at 1801 S Third St provides quick payday and title loans with 24-hour availability.
description_long:
Located at 1801 S Third St in Memphis, TN, this standalone Easy Payday Loans storefront sits in a convenient location for South Memphis residents. The branch operates virtually around the clock, staying open 3AM to 2AM every day of the week, making it accessible whenever you need emergency cash.

At this Memphis location, Easy Payday Loans offers fast payday advances and title loans designed for quick cash needs. While a direct phone line wasn't listed for this specific branch, you can visit in person during their extended hours to discuss your loan options with staff.

If you're a Memphis resident facing unexpected expenses, this South Memphis location is designed for fast processing. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and your banking information for the quickest approval. Easy Payday Loans has been serving Memphis for years with straightforward lending solutions.
pros: Online application process described as easy and fast
Same-day or next-day funding into borrower bank accounts
Serves 31 Nevada locations including Las Vegas, Reno, Henderson, and Carson City
No collateral required (unsecured personal loans mentioned)
Targets working individuals with employment verification requirements
Claims to handle inquiries with care
cons: Website contains numerous grammatical errors, repetitive language, and unclear writing that suggests poor professionalism
No APR, interest rates, fees, maximum loan amounts, or repayment terms disclosed on the website
No information about what happens if borrowers cannot repay or about rollovers/extensions
Vague claims about 'hard earned cash' and 'significant consolidation' without defining actual products
No visible compliance information, licensing details, or regulatory disclosures for Nevada lending laws
best_for: Nevada residents with unexpected emergencies needing $100-$1,000 quickly
Working individuals who can document employment and income
Borrowers who need funds before traditional bank loan approval timelines
diagnosis: Easy Payday Loans targets Nevada workers needing quick emergency cash, but the website's lack of transparent loan terms, rates, and regulatory information makes it impossible to verify actual lending practices or compliance. Borrowers should contact the company directly to obtain APR, fees, and repayment terms before applying, and should compare with licensed Nevada lenders and credit union payday alternatives.
services: Online payday loans in Las Vegas
Same-day or next-day bank deposit funding
Debt consolidation loan information (mentioned but not detailed)
meta_description: Memphis, TN Easy Payday Loans at 1801 S Third St. Fast payday and title loans, 24-hour service.
